推荐场景: 办公室茶水间｜听同事讲昨天活动
60秒任务: 「昨天做了什么」：过去事件时间线；A=重复确认后完成；B=猜测/乱确认翻车。
目标功能: 过去时｜事件顺序｜人物地点动作｜结果｜简单原因
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
What did you do yesterday?（询问过去）
I went to ___.（去了哪里）
I stayed at home.（待在家）
I watched a movie.（看电影）
I cooked dinner.（做晚饭）
I studied English.（学习）
First, I cleaned my room.（顺序一）
Then I went out.（顺序二）
I was tired, so I slept early.（原因+结果）
Did you have fun?（询问感受）
Yes, it was nice.（肯定回应）
No, it was boring.（否定回应）
I didn’t do much.（简单说明）
I met a friend.（遇见朋友）
I came back late.（晚回家）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: yesterday, home, movie, dinner, room, friend, work, class, English, night
Verbs: went, stayed, watched, cooked, studied, cleaned, slept, met, came back
Adjectives: tired, nice, boring, busy, late
Time / Place: yesterday, last night, at home, then, first
Chunks: did you do, slept early, went out, came back late, had fun
